name: beyondtax-pro
description: Use the Beyondtax Pro MCP connector from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Pro clients, engagements, tasks, billing, and gated task writes.
interface.longDescription: Beyondtax Pro connects Codex to the Pro MCP endpoint for workspace, client, engagement, task, team, billing, service-catalogue, and search workflows. Most tools are read-only; task writes are limited to guarded internal Pro task-card create and soft-delete flows that require write:tasks, exact preview, explicit confirmation, and an idempotency key.
defaultPrompt: Show my Beyondtax Pro workspace overview.
Find a Pro client or task.
Prepare a Pro task creation preview.
Prepare a Pro task delete preview.
